text: Hey, Patricia. So you wanted to know how to create how you can send or replenish inventory or create fulfillment order. So I wanted to make a short video on that. Let's say you want to replenish inventory, right? Then all you have to do is you have to select the products, select multiple ones. If you have to send multiple ones, then select multiple ones and then click on send or replenish inventory. If you, let's say, have to create Amazon fulfilled orders, then click on this. If you don't have to do multiple ones, let's say you just have to do one. You can click on this drop down of that product and then select oh, we don't have that option here. So you always have to select the product and then choose what you want to do from this drop down here. That's all. Thank you so much.
